## Environment

## Severity

- [ ] Critical - data loss, security issue, or complete feature failure
- [ ] High - feature significantly impaired, no workaround
- [ ] Medium - feature impaired but workaround exists
- [ ] Low - cosmetic issue or minor inconvenience

## Domain Impact

<!-- Does this bug affect any of the following? -->

- [ ] Capability data integrity (metadata loss, ID changes)
- [ ] Published model version correctness
- [ ] Downstream consumer data delivery
- [ ] Change request or approval workflow
- [ ] Audit trail completeness
